orderlabel 0.4.3
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

All functions

add_ages()
Add age and census age groups to a data frame
add_regions()
Add a "census_region" variable based on states
order_label()
Order your data and add percent labels
order_same()
Auto order a freqs table to match another freqs table
order_topline()
Add %s to a topline report
other_rm()
Auto change "Other please specify"s into "Other"
preamble_rm()
Auto remove question preambles for multiple choice/matrix questions
read_excel_allsheets()
Read multiple excel sheets at once
taking_names()
Create a dataframe of varaible names and labels

Developed by Nick Moffitt, Y2 Analytics.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
